caption: In a formal assembly hall with tiered wooden seating and green upholstered chairs, a group of people, mostly men, are seated. Many of the men are dressed in traditional white Indian attire, with some wearing colorful vests, such as pink, yellow, or blue. The individuals are seen listening and observing, with some glancing toward each other. In the center, a man wearing a white garment and a dark vest is seated and appears to be gesturing or speaking. The camera maintains a static medium shot throughout the sequence, capturing the attendees from the waist up. Between the frames, there is minimal movement; some people slightly shift their posture or turn their heads, while the man in the dark vest remains the focal point of the action. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or electronic equipment in the frame.
